title: 11 Teas to Help Men with Low Self-Esteem Break Free from Premature Ejaculation
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been used for centuries to help with premature ejaculation. The reason for this is due to the tea's ability to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation in the body. The properties and constituents of Ginkgo biloba include flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which help to relax the smooth muscles in the pelvic area and increase oxygenation of the blood.
